metadata.description: flow — an autonomous, self-evolving ticket→PR pipeline skill for Claude Code. Plans in plan mode (ExitPlanMode = the one gate), then runs implement→PR in a worktree, backgroundable anytime. Multi-tracker (Jira | beads), pluggable per-stage handlers, compounding memory, and a reflect stage that repairs its own harness.

plugins.name: flow
plugins.description: Claude Code adapter for the Flow ticket pipeline: /flow <ticket> plans in plan mode (ExitPlanMode = the one gate), then binds a worktree and runs the autonomous implement→PR tail in the same session; background it (/bg) anytime to run unattended. Multi-tracker engine (Jira | beads) with pluggable handlers, immutable ship-event evidence, and compounding memory.
